data.question_1: The harder I pushed for control, the less I actually had.
data.question_2: I measured success by exhaustion and called it discipline.
data.question_3: Letting go of the plan was the moment the business finally grew.
data.question_4: Trust compounds faster than effort ever will.
data.smiq: I almost did not admit that I nearly shut the whole thing down last winter.
data.additional_information: Please keep the tone warm and direct.
